description:
You are acting as a DevOps engineer who has to reproduce and document a minimal Python-package setup that is being debugged.  
  Follow the steps below and make sure that every requirement is met exactly—automated tests will check for *precise* matches.

  Goal
  ----
  1. Create a brand-new virtual environment.
  2. Install **exactly** two specific Python packages (no extras, no latest tag, pin the versions).
  3. Produce two log/flag files in a fixed format so that a CI system can later confirm the environment state.

  Directory layout to create
  --------------------------
  /home/user/devops_debug/  
  ├── venv/                 (the virtual-environment directory)  
  └── logs/                 (all verification files go here)  

  Packages and versions
  ---------------------
  • requests  == 2.28.1  
  • boto3     == 1.34.59  

  Required artefacts
  ------------------
  1. /home/user/devops_debug/logs/active_packages.log  
     • Text file, *Unix line endings*.  
     • Must contain **exactly** two non-empty lines, in the order shown below, with a trailing newline on each line:  
       requests==2.28.1  
       boto3==1.34.59  

  2. /home/user/devops_debug/logs/setup_complete.flag  
     • An empty file (size 0 bytes). Its mere presence signals success.

  Constraints & hints
  -------------------
  • Stay entirely under /home/user; you do NOT need sudo.  
  • Use Python’s built-in venv module for the virtual environment.  
  • After activating the venv, install the pinned package versions with pip.  
  • Do not install any additional packages other than pip’s own upgrade (optional) and the two required packages.  
  • When writing active_packages.log, be sure the package lines are **exact**—alphabetic case, ‘==’, and version numbers must match what is shown above.  
  • The whole job can be accomplished with just three or four shell commands.

  Verification
  ------------
  The automated grader will check:
  • Both files exist at the exact paths given.  
  • active_packages.log contains exactly the two required lines (and nothing else).  
  • setup_complete.flag exists and is empty.  
  • Inside /home/user/devops_debug/venv, ‘pip show requests’ returns Version: 2.28.1 and ‘pip show boto3’ returns Version: 1.34.59.

  Do not print or remove any extra files; stick to the specification above.
truth:
<!-- Directory that must exist -->
  Path: /home/user/devops_debug/

  <!-- Virtual environment directory -->
  Path: /home/user/devops_debug/venv/
  Contains: bin/activate  (and all standard venv files)

  <!-- Log directory -->
  Path: /home/user/devops_debug/logs/

  <!-- Verification file #1 -->
  File: /home/user/devops_debug/logs/active_packages.log
  Contents (including trailing newlines):
    requests==2.28.1\n
    boto3==1.34.59\n

  <!-- Verification file #2 -->
  File: /home/user/devops_debug/logs/setup_complete.flag
  Contents: (empty)

  <!-- Package versions that must be installed inside the venv -->
  pip show requests -> Version: 2.28.1
  pip show boto3    -> Version: 1.34.59
